articles.full_text:
Telangana yellow alert: Hyderabad to see thunderstorms, lightning and 36-40°C
Heads up, Telangana! The weather department has issued a yellow alert for several districts, including Hyderabad, warning about thunderstorms, lightning, and gusty winds.
The city started the day under cloudy skies and you can expect rain or storms to stick around through April 2.
Temperatures will stay pretty warm, between 36 degrees Celsius and 40 degrees Celsius.
Telangana winds alert, Andhra Pradesh rainfall
12 districts like Mahabubnagar and Nagarkurnool are on alert for strong winds (30 to 50km/h). There is also a general warning for possible storms on April 4 and 5 across Telangana.
Meanwhile, Andhra Pradesh is gearing up too: places like Alluri Sitarama Raju and Srikakulam could see light to moderate rainfall as weather patterns shift in the area.
